title: Brand
description: the coherent identity of one brand — who the business is, made coherent: voice, values, positioning, the lexicon. A thin hard-edged anchor (id / name / tenant / lifecycle state / envelope) carrying the nine identity elements as SOFT element_schema_v0.3 objects. The headwaters anchor every downstream System realizes.

valid_from.description: business-truth window start — when this fact became true in the world; null = since-forever

valid_to.description: business-truth window end — when this fact stopped being true; null = still valid

confidence.description: reliability score for this instance; 1.0 = certain, 0 = no confidence

state.description: the domain discovery lifecycle — DR-005; NOT the solution-design draft/reviewed/accepted

belongs_to_tenant.description: the owning org; optional-single — a Brand may be modelled before its Tenant exists, so no reverse dangling ref; one Tenant has many Brands

positioning.description: element_schema_v0.3 — what we are relative to the category; Ries & Trout

voice.description: element_schema_v0.3 — how the brand sounds, with its antithesis

values.description: element_schema_v0.3 — what the brand stands for

lexicon.description: element_schema_v0.3 + banned[]/preferred[] — the deterministic lexicon-consistency gate material

claims.description: element_schema_v0.3 — substantiable brand claims; the claim-substantiation hard gate

visual_identity.description: element_schema_v0.3 — the prose visual-identity element; its realization is a DesignSystem

distinctive_assets.description: element_schema_v0.3 — logo/wordmark/signature DESCRIPTIONS; the realized FILES live on DesignSystem.distinctive_assets
